untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic percentile-based thresholds derived from indicator lookback window history. The exact lookback_bars, entry_percentile_threshold, and decile_target parameters are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be determined without additional specification. Standard indicators cannot dynamically compute rolling percentiles—this requires custom percentile calculation logic not available in the allowed operator set. Approximated with RSI extremes (20/80) and mid-level exit (50) as a mean-reversion proxy.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction interpreted as both LONG and SHORT entry conditions. Used rsi_14 as a mean-reversion indicator proxy since the signal does not specify which indicator to apply percentile analysis to. Entry at extreme percentiles approximated as RSI crossing into extreme zones. Exit at middle percentile approximated as RSI returning to 50 midpoint. Source text is incomplete (cuts off mid-sentence), limiting precision of interpretation.
